26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @marquettegoldeneagles and hubby shared the first of their Halloween Lego displays!
27 And it lights up!
28 Man Tax: Zane Phillips
"Gentlemen, you can't fight in here! This is the War Room!" - President Merkin Muffley I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator feel free to leave me a tip
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: This is my home
item.description: I transitioned at 33, and im about to turn 36. I fucking love my life, finally. And I love my home. Im not letting these not see punks run me out of my own home, my own country. Someone's gotta keep us dolls represented, lest we conveniently disappear from the conversation. Keep trying. Im not fucking leaving.
item.dc:creator: kitenkatt

item.title: repost
item.description: comedian Drew Lynch " At a show this past weekend in Spokane, something happened that I will never forget. In the middle of my set, a man in the audience collapsed from a heart attack. What happened next was one of the most powerful examples of community and human connection I’ve ever seen. Without hesitation, people in the audience began taking turns performing CPR, clearing space for paramedics, and monitoring his vitals. He had no pulse for over 5 minutes. With the combined efforts of total strangers, and honestly, by what felt like a miracle that night, he was revived right there in the room. The entire audience came together in that moment—no egos, no identities, no division—just one goal: saving a life. The next day my funny friends Akeem, Rachel and I visited Mr. Wende in the hospital to finish the show for him. Getting to laugh and share stories with his family for hours in the hospital was the reminder I needed of why comedy is so needed- especially in times when the world feels so torn apart. HUGE thank you to the people of Spokane, the brave medical professionals, and the Wende family for bringing this man into my life and reminding me just how special community can be. #spokane " story source: https://www.krem.com/article/news/local/drew-lynch-spokane-comedy-show-man-has-heart-attack-revived-by-audience/293-bdbaedd1-0398-4786-812b-b18ca0694a12
item.dc:creator: atadrisque

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1479 (wok party)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. Minimal commentary today, taking advantage of last night's storm for some birding.
*wok party
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Peekaboo! Haha" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Yooooo... she's right
item.description: Kinda taken aback rn, but this is a valid argument. That and the Right has been at this indoctrination thing for decades and a lot of now-adults, then-children have/had parents who were taught "conservatism" by their parents, and so on. I feel like leftists pick up on politics a little later in life and not so much from their parents. Probably because we like making good decisions based on facts, and that can take a while to fully process.
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: Mice Nuts
item.description: Another craven institutional capitulation to creeping authoritarianism as Disney takes Jimmy Kimmel off the air. And the freakin’ fascists hadn’t even started to push very hard yet. This is what Timothy Snyder warns not to do in “On Tyrrany.” The first damned lesson: “Do not obey in advance.” It only encourages the MFs.

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Spaghetti
item.description:
Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Bean at the vet! This was not the room we're used to being in.. It was strange and we had to investigate all things... But still time to look pretty!
Bonus Tax; Bean remembers this lady... She poked us with sharp things last time we were here!
Bonus Bonus Tax; Tired Beans, sleeping with her emotional support dinosaur. I've uploaded a couple albums to the kofi for more pictures from Bean's vet visit. All pet pictures are free for everyone to view and enjoy! https://ko-fi.com/theunnamedpoet
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet
